description: The ParCollection class can be used to access Parameters. To access a parameter you need to use its internal name, which you can obtain by hovering your mouse over the parameter name, and looking at the popup that will come up. See also Par Class. An operator's instance of this can be found in `OP.par`.

members.name: owner
members.description: The OP to which this object belongs.

methods.description: Parameters may be easily accessed using the [] subscript and assignment operators. *name - Must be an exact string name. Wildcards are not supported. If not found None is returned.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the ParCollection Class wiki page
